metadata.description: Common name prefix used to derive resource names.
Admin username for the jumpbox VM.
Admin password for the jumpbox VM. Stored in Key Vault as an initial secret.
Source CIDR allowed to RDP/SSH to the jumpbox (e.g. 203.0.113.10/32).
Object ID of the principal that should receive Key Vault Secrets Officer on the new vault (typically the deploying user).
Common tags applied to every resource.
Admin password for jumpbox; persisted as the initial Key Vault secret.
Principal that should receive Key Vault Secrets Officer on the vault.

resources.name: [guid(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', take(format('kv-{0}-{1}', parameters('namePrefix'), uniqueString(resourceGroup().id)), 24)), resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('id-vm-{0}', parameters('namePrefix'))), variables('keyVaultSecretsUserRoleId'))]

metadata.description: Source CIDR allowed to RDP/SSH to the jumpbox.
Admin username for the jumpbox VM.
Admin password for the jumpbox VM.
Resource ID of the internal LB backend pool the app tier joins.
Resource ID of the jumpbox public IP.
Resource ID of the user-assigned managed identity.
VM size used for the jumpbox and tier VMSS.
